div.p: CAP Trade-off: Consistency preserved, Availability maintained in majority

ul.li: Minority partition: unavailable Partition Tolerance: ✓ Required

**State**: Follower (term T-1) **Vote**: Voted for Node 1 **Status": Waiting for leader

div.p: ❌ CANNOT ELECT 2 nodes < 3 (majority) Partitioned from cluster
✓ ELECTED LEADER 3 nodes = majority of 5 Cluster operational
